Buying a vintage watch should feel exciting, not uncertain.

At Mainspring, every piece is checked, serviced if needed, and explained — so you know exactly what you’re buying and why it’s worth it.

It’s simple: we want you to love your watch for years to come.

Whether you’re just starting your collection or adding your next favourite, you’ll find watches here that are honest, well-kept, and ready to wear.

Your personal guide to better watches,
Erkan😊

Every weekend, I bring a carefully selected collection of vintage watches, rare finds, and timeless classics to the @dubaifleamarket 

Whether you’re searching for your next statement piece, starting your collection, or just love the vintage watch atmosphere, come say hi and explore the collection in person. 

📍Our weekly location and market updates are announced on our stories and posts — so make sure to follow along and never miss where we’ll be next weekend. See you at the market! 🖤

#DubaiFleaMarket #VintageWatches #DubaiWatches #WatchCollector #LuxuryWatches VintageRolex WatchAddict WatchFam WatchCommunity DubaiLifestyle

Two stunning Raymond Weils are in the stocks now. Both are in excellent condition, both are stunners, both have their certificates..

Two-toned quartz dress watch is 1800dhs, from 2016, from The Watch House UAE.
The Automatic watch is 4000dhs, and will come with its open-dated certificate and original box.
Both have their original bracelet/straps.

Tabby, Tamara, Card and Cash payment options. Check them in the store, in The B1 Mall, 1:30-11:30PM everyday.

A Patina can turn a watch from a timepiece into a story.
No two age the same—every mark, every shade, every tone makes it uniquely its own. What time changes, it also makes unforgettable.

Omega Constellation Calendar 1960s
Ref. 2943-1 SC 
Cal.504 Chronometer Automatic Movement
Two-tone, gold-filled (not plated) 34mm case
Price : 5,500dhs +VAT
Tabby, Tamara, Card, Cash

Seiko 5 is a legend since 1960s. We have 12 authentic Seikos in the lot. No hype, no marketing tricks, no unnecessary luxury. Only watches made to be worn.
Visit us @theb1mall everyday.
